---
title: "Graphs"
author: "Izzi Bauerle"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
library(IzziFlagWeather)  
library(ggplot2)


Flagstaff_Weather
```

```{r}
max_temps<- ggplot(Flagstaff_Weather, aes(x=DATE, y=TMAX)) +
    geom_line()+
  ylim(-25,100)
min_temps <-ggplot(Flagstaff_Weather, aes(x=DATE, y=TMIN)) +
    geom_line()+
  ylim(-25,100)

  
cowplot::plot_grid(min_temps,max_temps)
```
```{r}
ggplot(Flagstaff_Weather, aes(x=DATE, y=SNOW,color=TMIN)) +
    geom_point()+
  scale_color_gradient2(low = 'cadetblue1', mid='darkslategray', midpoint=25, high='orange')
```
